items.title: Show HN: Ultracodex – Run Claude Ultracode Dynamic Workflows with Codex Agents
items.why_it_matters: Ultracodex lets you run Claude's advanced workflow scripts using Codex agents, helping you preserve your expensive Claude Fable quota by delegating the heavy lifting to Codex. Since you use both Claude Code and Codex, this lets you keep Claude focused on high-level planning while Codex handles the repetitive implementation work. Try cloning the repo this week and running your next Next.js component generation through Ultracodex to save your Claude limits.

items.title: Show HN: Pull Claude Code transcripts into your Codex session, and vice versa
items.why_it_matters: Contextify is a local tool that indexes your Claude Code and Codex sessions into a single searchable database, allowing you to search past prompts and code across both tools using a simple command. This is perfect for your workflow since you switch between Claude and Codex when hitting rate limits. Try installing the app today and using `/total-recall` in Claude Code to pull in context from a previous Codex session.

items.title: Show HN: Make your terminal pulse orange when Claude Code needs input
items.why_it_matters: This simple terminal utility makes your terminal tab pulse orange when Claude Code is blocked waiting for your input or permission, and solid green when it finishes a task. It prevents you from sitting idle or losing track of your agent while it waits for you to type 'y'. Try adding this lightweight script to your terminal today so you can multi-task without stalling your shipping momentum.

items.title: Show HN: LimitBar, a macOS menu bar app showing your Claude usage limits
items.why_it_matters: LimitBar is a lightweight, zero-token macOS menu bar app that polls the Anthropic endpoint to show your current Claude usage limits at a glance. Instead of constantly running `/usage` or guessing when you'll hit a rate limit, you can see your remaining budget directly in your menu bar. Try downloading the under-1MB app today to plan your coding sessions more effectively.

items.title: Save Claude Code Tokens with Smart Routing
items.why_it_matters: Smart Routing (brick-SR1) is a utility designed to save Claude Code tokens by intelligently routing requests to optimize context usage. Since token drain is the biggest bottleneck when vibe coding complex features, this helps stretch your daily budget. Try setting up this routing proxy this week before starting your next major Supabase integration to see how many tokens you can save.
